# https://php.zeal.ninja/robots.txt
# Public framework documentation site — open to crawlers, with a few noisy
# paths excluded to keep the index focused.

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# JSON API endpoints (live-demo backends, no SEO value).
Disallow: /api/

# Live demo endpoints — same: backend calls behind "LIVE OUTPUT" panels.
Disallow: /demo/

# Sitemap (dynamically generated by route/sitemap.php).
Sitemap: https://php.zeal.ninja/sitemap.xml
